hero.headline: Public corruption is the crisis behind every crisis. We're the generation ending that.
hero.subtitle: We believe in the power of collective action to create meaningful change.

about.title: While the world addresses symptons, we target the root cause
about.description: YAC Foundation is the first youth-led international organization to treat public corruption as what the evidence shows it to be: the structural barrier behind slow development, weakened institutions, and unrealized potential. We bring together young leaders from every background, ideology, and country, united not by politics, but by one shared conviction: public corruption is not inevitable, and this generation will prove it.
bullets: We connect evidence to the institutions that have the power to act.

items.title: Youth Fellows for the SDGs
items.description: 200+ young researchers across 12 countries documenting how public corruption undermines SDG progress — producing the evidence that institutions need to act.

items.title: Youth Corruption Perception Index
items.description: The first youth-led public corruption perception index in Latin America — turning the lived experience of young people across 15 countries into policy-grade evidence.

items.title: The Integrity Pledge
items.description: Young leaders across Latin America publicly committing to integrity before taking office — creating accountability where it matters most.

items.title: Youth Integrity Academy
items.description: Building the next generation of leaders equipped to demand and practice integrity in public life — beyond ethics, toward action.

research.title: Evidence & Insights
research.description: Our research drives innovation and informs policy recommendations.

act.subtitle: Join us in making a difference
